rationale: Both correctly diagnose the config/model mismatch, cite the same crashing lines in hunyuan_image3.py, confirm the DiT-config workaround, and propose the guard+docs fix while deferring to a tracking issue per Gaohan123 — matching the thread closely. X is more tightly grounded, citing specific line ranges in both deploy YAMLs and quoting their headers, and closes with a status note (bug resolved, hardening deferred, hardware caveat) that mirrors real maintainer practice. Y adds an unsupported, thread-unverified claim that the extended ratio tokens are 'for the IT2I (image editing) pathway,' which is speculative embellishment not grounded in any cited evidence, slightly hurting its grounding/correctness despite an otherwise solid, more concise answer.
